data.title: Disney Springs® Resort Area Hotels Extend Special Spring Rate Starting At $92
data.description: Experience the enchantment of EPCOT's International Flower & Garden Festival in Lake Buena Vista, Florida. Commencing on April 13, 2026, travelers can enjoy discounted rates for a Disney spring getaway starting from $92 per night, excluding taxes. These special rates are open for booking and stays until June 30th.

data.description: A recent investment has boosted the company's strategy of incorporating specialty care within health system operations, which is currently operational across several prominent health system partners. The investment also supports an AI-native workforce platform designed to expand efficiently. The development took place in Richmond, Virginia on April 13, 2026.

data.title: Southeast Coastal State Chapters Come Together to Lead and Advocate for Financial Education
data.description: In Orlando, Florida, as of April 13, 2026, the National Financial Educators Council® (NFEC) is enjoying a notable expansion in the Southeast Coastal Region with vibrant state chapters in Alabama, Florida, Georgia, and South Carolina. These chapters together constitute a significant presence for the NFEC in the region.

data.title: ImageKit Introduces Path Policies for Media Governance in Its Digital Asset Management Platform.
data.description: A company based in Newark, Delaware has recently unveiled a new feature called Path policies aimed at aiding businesses in enforcing asset governance on a large scale within its digital asset management platform. This update by ImageKit is designed to streamline asset management processes, catering to the needs of businesses dealing with extensive digital assets.

data.title: Shared Harvest Foundation Announces Ribbon Cutting Ceremony for Altadena Families Coming Home After Eaton Fire
data.description: In Altadena, California on April 13, 2026, a poppyfield block party commemorated the return of displaced families following a devastating event. The Shared Harvest Foundation revealed intentions to collaborate with three non-profit organizations in Altadena to greet two families back to the community.

data.title: 26North Raises $5.9 Billion for Inaugural Private Equity Fund, Surpassing $4 Billion Target
data.description: A private equity firm, 26North, has successfully concluded the fundraising for its first fund by securing around $5.9 billion in capital commitments. This figure exceeded their initial target of $4 billion, reflecting strong investor interest in the firm's investment strategy.

data.title: Per Scholas Releases New White Paper Highlighting the Power of Its Satellite Model to Expand Access to Tech Careers Nationwide
data.description: A collaboration-oriented strategy has resulted in similar outcomes, reduced expenses, and improved entry to marginalized areas. In New York on April 13, 2026, Per Scholas unveiled its newest white paper, Shared Success: Harnessing Partnerships to enhance access. The approach has led to cost savings of $X and improved access to underserved communities, demonstrating the effectiveness of cooperative efforts in achieving positive results.

data.title: Windstar Cruises Selects IDeaS to Advance Demand Forecasting and Pricing Strategy
data.description: A boutique cruise line that is experiencing growth is utilizing advanced analytics for forecasting and making informed pricing decisions. Based in Minneapolis, on April 13, 2026, IDeaS, a SAS company and key provider of revenue management software for the hospitality industry, announces the expansion of its RMS solution. This development will enhance the cruise line's capabilities and support smarter pricing strategies for the company as it continues to expand its operations.

data.title: American Outdoor Grill Invites Families to Gather with the New T-Series
data.description: A renowned brand, American Outdoor Grill® (AOG), under RH Peterson Co.®, unveils its latest product in City of Industry, CA on April 13, 2026. This new offering boasts durability and analog performance, promising reliable grilling experiences for significant gatherings. AOG's innovative design caters to the American market, reflecting the company's commitment to quality and customer satisfaction.

data.title: EMEET Launches C960 Ultra: A 4K Webcam Built on the Million-Selling Series
data.description: On April 13, 2026, EMEET unveiled the new EMEET C960 Ultra in Hong Kong. This device is the newest in the C960 line, which has already sold more than 2 million units globally. The C960 Ultra is tailored for professionals, streamers, and content creators, offering enhanced features for optimal performance.

data.description: A corporation is expanding the development of a cassette platform utilizing Kevlar, aiming to aid U.S. public safety agencies with non-lethal capture strategies for drone-to-drone and air-to-ground interactions.

data.description: Get ready to enhance product sourcing, private labeling, and manufacturing at NHS Concept to Commerce in March 2027. A significant development occurred in the retail sector as NHS Concept to Commerce was launched successfully in LAS VEGAS on April 13, 2026. data.title: Ola Sol Leads the Low-ABV Cocktail Category with a Three-Product Ecosystem That Gives Any Beer and Wine-Licensed Establishment the Ability to Serve Cocktails
data.description: After being established for two years, the high-end agave wine company has received a stellar 93-point rating from Wine Enthusiast, expanded to over 325 distribution points in California, and achieved a remarkable 1,000% increase in sales year-over-year. This growth has culminated in their recent accomplishments, with the brand making significant strides since its inception in Los Angeles on April 13, 2026.

data.title: Telix Pharma Gains As Regeneron Tie-Up Targets Solid Tumor Programs
data.description: Telix Pharmaceuticals Limited (NASDAQ: TLX) stock is seeing an increase in premarket trading on Monday following a partnership announcement with Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ: REGN). Regeneron, a US-based biotechnology company, and Telix, a radiopharmaceutical company, are joining forces to develop advanced radiopharmaceutical therapies. This collaboration aims to strengthen Telix's position in precision oncology by utilizing its expertise in radiopharmaceutical development and manufacturing. The partnership will involve sharing commercialization costs and profits. Telix's radiopharmaceutical development platform and global manufacturing capabilities will be combined with Regeneron's biologics expertise, specifically in bispecific antibody discovery. The collaboration will target multiple solid tumor indications from Regeneron's antibody portfolio.
